reasoning: José Cardoso was actively trying to run for the 2026 Portugal presidential election, representing the Partido Liberal Social. However, on December 23, 2025, the Portuguese Constitutional Court officially rejected his candidacy because he failed to correct irregularities in his application process within the legal timeframe. There are now 11 admitted candidates. While Cardoso's name will remain on the physical ballot papers due to logistical issues, any votes cast for him will be officially counted as null (nulo). Therefore, it is legally and practically impossible for him to win the election. My probability is floored at 0.02, reflecting absolute certainty that he will not win.
